client_construction.code: g, err := sarama.NewConsumerGroup([]string{brokers}, groupID, sarama.NewConfig()); if err != nil { return nil, err }

primary_operations.name: Process
primary_operations.sdk_call: for { if err := s.group.Consume(ctx, s.topics, s.handler); err != nil { return err }; if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil { return err } }

code_style_notes: ConsumerGroup.Consume rebalances on group changes — call it in a loop
